creator: donner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Current state of investigation:

Observed behavior is caused by a very large amount of MAC addresses on a single (up)link. Normally I've applied https://reviews.freebsd.org/D23963 to the local source tree. But due to the git-transition, this patch was missed.

I'll recheck with the patch applied and assume the ticket can be closed afterwards.

Seems to be my fault.
